section: ARECO Schedule A: Assets and Unearned Income
layout_note: Typed attachment table, transposed spreadsheet layout: one asset per column (3 asset columns), attribute labels down the left (EIF; SP/DC/JT; Stock Name; Ticker; Transaction; Value of Asset A-L + Spouse/DC; Type of Income; Amount of Income A-K + Spouse/DC). Selections are black-filled cells. The entire Transaction row is one continuous black band across all three asset columns (no letter visible) - treated as a divider/redaction, transaction recorded as null. Amount of Income B: $1-$200 is a black band spanning all three columns (verified at high zoom).

uncertainties.read: entire Transaction row black-filled across all 3 columns
uncertainties.note: black band spans every asset column uniformly with no P/S/E letter visible; likely a formatting divider rather than a marked transaction, recorded null for all three assets
